description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, rectangular design with a light wood finish and a smooth, flat top surface. The front is divided into two main sections: an upper open shelf and a lower section with two large doors, each featuring a reflective, mirror-like panel. The sides and back are constructed from the same light wood material, giving the piece a cohesive and contemporary appearance. The doors lack visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or recessed grip. The wardrobe stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its clean lines and neutral tones make it suitable for urban interiors, such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A modern, light wood wardrobe with mirrored double doors and an open upper shelf, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing mirrored double doors and an open shelf above, with a light wood frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, continuous light wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned back panel in a lighter tone, with hinges visible on the detached doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain light wood panel.
